summary: Iteration 70: Scheduling Constraints Feature Tests - 10/10 tests PASSED (100%). Verified all 7 requested features for the new scheduling constraints: (1) GET /api/procedures/slots/{date} returns booked_slots dict with patient_name and scheduled_by, (2) Empty booked_slots for dates with no procedures, (3) POST /api/procedures returns 409 on duplicate slot with descriptive message including patient name and scheduler name, (4) Different time slot on same day succeeds, (5) Same time slot on different day succeeds, (6) created_by_name field present in procedure list response, (7) 409 error message includes patient name and scheduler name.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/procedures/slots/{date} correctly returns booked_slots dict with patient_name and scheduled_by fields
POST /api/procedures correctly returns 409 when attempting to book an already-booked slot
409 error message is descriptive: 'The 10:00 AM slot on {date} is already booked for patient {patient_name} (scheduled by {scheduler_name}). Please choose a different time or date.'
Different time slots on same day (10:00 and 14:00) can be booked successfully
Same time slot on different days can be booked successfully
created_by_name field is correctly populated in procedure responses for dashboard display
Student-created procedures also correctly block slots and show scheduled_by info
seed_data_creation: None - tests create and cleanup their own test procedures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scheduling constraints feature fully tested in iteration 70. All 7 requested features verified working. GET /api/procedures/slots/{date} returns booked_slots dict with patient_name and scheduled_by. POST /api/procedures returns 409 with descriptive error message when attempting duplicate slot booking. created_by_name field present in procedure responses. Tests clean up after themselves by deleting test procedures.

feature_1_get_slots_with_booked_info.result: PASS - GET /api/procedures/slots/{date} returns booked_slots dict with patient_name and scheduled_by

feature_2_get_slots_empty_date.result: PASS - Returns empty booked_slots {} for date with no procedures

feature_3_duplicate_slot_rejection_409.result: PASS - Returns 409 with descriptive message when attempting to book already-booked slot

feature_4_different_time_same_day.result: PASS - Booking 10:00 then 14:00 on same day succeeds

feature_5_same_time_different_day.result: PASS - Booking 10:00 on different days succeeds

feature_6_created_by_name_in_list.result: PASS - created_by_name field present in procedure list response

feature_7_409_error_includes_names.result: PASS - 409 error message includes patient name and scheduler name

tested_endpoints.GET /api/procedures/slots/{date}: 200 - Returns booked_slots dict with patient_name and scheduled_by
tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures: 200 for valid new slot, 409 for duplicate slot with descriptive error message

sample_responses.409_error_message: The 10:00 AM slot on 2026-06-09 is already booked for patient TEST_FirstPatient_Duplicate (scheduled by Dr. Paresh Gandhi). Please choose a different time or date.
